## beehiiv custom-fields delete

Delete a custom field

### Synopsis

Delete custom field

Delete a custom field from a publication

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/custom_fields/{id}

```
beehiiv custom-fields delete <id> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv custom-fields delete custom_field_123
beehiiv fields remove custom_field_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for delete
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
